title: turnera sidoides subsp. integrifolia
intro: Turnera sidoides subsp. integrifolia is a subspecies of the Turnera sidoides plant, commonly known as the "Sleeping Grass" due to its sedative properties. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Turnera sidoides subsp. integrifolia include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
